headline: Leeds bid £20m for Southampton's Shea Charles; talks ongoing
body: Leeds United has submitted a £20 million bid for Southampton midfielder Shea Charles, with negotiations currently underway.
text: Leeds have made a bid worth £20m for Southampton midfielder Shea Charles. Talks between the clubs are ongoing.⚪️
